case_title: ANDERS FUNG VS. ANTHONY DEANDRE MCINTYRE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2024 BY MARY E. WISS. PLAINTIFF ANDERS FUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY DEANDRE MCINTYRE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUN-28-2024 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY FUNG, ANDERS AS TO DEFENDANT MCINTYRE, ANTHONY DEANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $100 SERVED APR-25-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCINTYRE, ANTHONY DEANDRE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUNG, ANDERS AS TO DEFENDANT MCINTYRE, ANTHONY DEANDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUNG, ANDERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCINTYRE, ANTHONY DEANDRE $2,325.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $11.95 ACCRUED INTEREST, $45.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MCINTYRE, ANTHONY DEANDRE
